cryptorate: My first React application. Cryptorate connects with external API - DatoCMS, has pagination and is fully responsive.
todo-list: Clone of Google Keep, simple TODO List made with React, React-Redux and Redux-Saga. It has most of Google Keep features.
tic-tac-toe: XOXO is a simple game with three game modes: local (1v1), vs computer (Ai) and multiplayer online(socket.io).
